title: Midnight Potstick
description: A crunchy and bitter Irish dish made with potato starch, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings without eggs.

ingredients.name: potato starch
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality potato starch for best results.

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: Ensure water is at a safe cooking temperature (not hot to the touch).

ingredients.name: oil for frying
ingredients.amount: enough to coat bottom of pan
ingredients.notes: Can be any neutral oil like vegetable or corn oil.

instructions: Mix potato starch with water in a bowl until no lumps remain.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Once hot, pour the starch-water mixture into the pan and stir continuously to prevent sticking.
Cook for about 10-15 minutes or until the potstick is golden brown and crispy on all sides.
Remove from heat and serve warm with a sprinkle of salt if desired.
